ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Continued To Nov-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espey for and with (executor) John Bettencourt.

The Court stated that there is no one present to object and confirmed that Ms. Espey was not aware of any objections, that there is an issue as to whether the lining out of the decedents sisters name is a contrary intention and that her grandchildren do not take. Ms. Espey stated that in the examiner's notes, #2 stated that Virginia post-deceased decedent but that she actually pre-deceased him, that they filed a supplement this morning regarding the reserve on the sale proceeds, that it also brings the interest up to today's date and adds the AP number. The Court stated that it will need to continue this matter to review the new information. Ms. Espey stated that if they have to amend the petition the beneficiaries will probably waive notice. The court stated that all potential heirs would need to either waive or receive notice. The accounting petition was continued to November 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and Ms. Espey was told that if an amendment was needed the examiner would let her know.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
